name: Room Server Firmware v1.15.0
notes:
https://blog.meshcore.io/2026/04/19/release-1-15-0

- Default Scope support
- Support for New GROUP_DATA (binary) packets #1928 #2130
- Heltec V4.3 support #1867
- Heltec nRF Tracker (T096) support #2097
- GAT562 Mesh EVB Pro repeater and room server support #2042
- Radio rxgain now ON by default #2124
- Radio freq range now supported down to 150Mhz #2126
- GPS pref peristence fix #2018
- New get|set dutycycle CLI command #1961
- Muzi Works R1 Neo support #2007
- GAT562 Watch support #2138 #2228
- BME680 sensor init fix #2227
- Heltec Wireless Paper battery read fix #2164
- WiFi companion fixes for Heltec V4,TBeam 1W #1833
- Waveshare RP2040: RXEN fix #2298
- nRF companion, support for OTA updates #2323
- Added companion for Heltec Wireless Paper #2315
- Misc #2134 #2190 #1425 #2075 #2302 #2306
- Xiao C3 bootloop fix #2328

name: Room Server Firmware v1.14.1
notes:
change log:
Added GPS support for SenseCAP Solar P1 in #1589
Power off switch long press support for SenseCAP Solar P1 #1871
Added nRF52 power management for RAK3401 in #1984
Added token bucket based duty cycle enforcement in #1297
Added support for new GAT562 30S Mesh Kit device in #2009
Added support for new GAT562 Mesh Tracker Pro device in #1980
Added LNA toggle CLI commands radio.rxgain on and radio.rxgain off in #1653
Added MCU temperature to telemetry responses from room servers in #2052
Migrated Heltec Tracker v2 to KCT8103L in #1936
Nodes with GPS enabled will now auto sync time every 30 minutes in #1350
Fixed bug where some queued packets would not get transmit in #1877
Fixed bug where automatic adverts were not using the configured multibyte path setting in fcfdc5f

name: Repeater Firmware v1.14.1
notes:
change log:
Added GPS support for SenseCAP Solar P1 in #1589
Power off switch long press support for SenseCAP Solar P1 #1871
Added nRF52 power management for RAK3401 in #1984
Added token bucket based duty cycle enforcement in #1297
Added support for new GAT562 30S Mesh Kit device in #2009
Added support for new GAT562 Mesh Tracker Pro device in #1980
Added LNA toggle CLI commands radio.rxgain on and radio.rxgain off in #1653
Added MCU temperature to telemetry responses from room servers in #2052
Migrated Heltec Tracker v2 to KCT8103L in #1936
Nodes with GPS enabled will now auto sync time every 30 minutes in #1350
Fixed bug where some queued packets would not get transmit in #1877
Fixed bug where automatic adverts were not using the configured multibyte path setting in https://github.com/meshcore-dev/MeshCore/commit/fcfdc5fc5b1e0cf81b4ca2dfbc51d714f3eb1ead

name: Companion Firmware v1.14.1
notes:
change log:

* RAK3401 power optimisations

name: Companion Firmware v1.14.0

* new ‘auto add max hops’ preference
* new radio AGC reset implementation
* HeltecV4 power fixes
* RAK3401 power optimisations

name: Room Server Firmware v1.13.0
notes:
Change log:
* Thinknode M3 fixes
* new boards: T-Beam 1W, M5 Stack C6
* nRF board sleep optimisations
* Heltec V4: improved RX sensitivity, low power fixes
* WIO Tracker L1 Grove sensor support

name: Repeater Firmware v1.13.0
notes:
Change log:
* Thinknode M3 fixes
* new boards: T-Beam 1W, M5 Stack C6
* new stats field: receive errors
* nRF board sleep optimisations
* Heltec V4: improved RX sensitivity, low power fixes
* WIO Tracker L1 Grove sensor support

name: Companion Firmware v1.13.0
notes:
Change log:
* off-grid (client repeat) mode support
* buzzer sound logic reverted
* new boards: T-Beam 1W, M5 Stack C6
* some UI fixes, mute icon
* blob file cleanup added
* Heltec V4: improved RX sensitivity, low power fixes
* WIO Tracker L1 Grove sensor support

name: Room Server Firmware v1.12.0
notes:
Change log:
* new boards: Thinknode M6, M3, RAK3401, RAK11310, Meshtiny
* nRF low power recovery manager
* sensor fixes: BMP280, LPS22HB, SHTC3
* new “clkreboot” CLI
* on-boot adverts now zero-hop
* remote “set prv.key” CLI 
* new “get/set owner.info” CLI
* flood.advert.interval range now 3..168 hours
* MCU temperature now in telemetry responses

name: Repeater Firmware v1.12.0
notes:
Change log:
* new boards: Thinknode M6, M3, RAK3401, RAK11310, Meshtiny
* nRF low power recovery manager (CLI ‘pwrmgt’)
* Stats: new recv errors counter
* region names now without ‘#’, new ‘region list’ CLI
* ESP32: new “powersaving on/off” CLI
* new “clkreboot” CLI
* on-boot adverts now zero-hop
* new “get/set owner.info” CLI
* flood.advert.interval range now 3..168 hours
* remote “set prv.key” CLI 
* new zero-hop anonReq types (Region discovery, owner info, clock sync)
* MCU temperature now in telemetry responses

name: Companion Firmware v1.12.0
notes:
Change log:
* new boards: Thinknode M6, M3, RAK3401, RAK11310, Meshtiny
* nRF low power recovery manager
* BLE code rewritten
* WiFi serial fixes
* contacts db can now overwrite old entries
* new prefs: buzzer quiet, gps enabled, gps interval

name: Room Server Firmware v1.11.0
notes:
Change log:
* remote login bug fix (no responses after login)
* Extended Trace support
* get/set adc,multiplier support
* New boards: Ikoka handheld, Keepteen LT1

name: Repeater Firmware v1.11.0
notes:
Change log:
* remote login bug fix (no responses after login)
* Extended Trace support
* get/set adc,multiplier support
* RAK4631: Uart bridge support
* New boards: Ikoka handheld, Keepteen LT1

name: Companion Firmware v1.11.0
notes:
Change log:
* buzzer pref now persisted
* Extended Trace support
* node stats support
* Heltec T114: GPS support
* New boards: Ikoka handheld, Keepteen LT1, Thinknode M5
* Xiao NRF52 + Wio: User Button and Power-Off Support
* NRF52: Support low power sleep for RF module when device is powered off
* Heltec T114, Xiao NRF52, RAK WisMesh Tag: Enable DC/DC converter to reduce power

name: Room Server Firmware v1.10.0
notes:
Change log:
* remote GPS management
* guest permission fix
* uptime wrap fix
* txdelay granularity change
* Fixed: VolatileRTCClock wrapping after 49 days
* SF 5 & 6, BW down to 7.8 now supported

name: Repeater Firmware v1.10.0
notes:
Change log:
* #region support (and new CLI commands)
* bridge config CLI
* remote GPS management
* guest permission fix
* uptime wrap fix
* txdelay granularity change
* Fixed: VolatileRTCClock wrapping after 49 days
* SF 5 & 6, BW down to 7.8 now supported
* new local DISCOVER_REQ support

name: Companion Firmware v1.10.0
notes:
Change log:
* remote GPS management
* txdelay granularity change
* SF 5 & 6, BW down to 7.8 now supported
* new local DISCOVER_REQ/_RESP support
* support for ‘scope’ when sending channel msg
* lots of UI fixes/additions
* Fix: Share contact zero hop now does not affect repeater neighbour tables

name: Repeater Firmware v1.9.1
notes:
Change log:
* login bug fix
* new CLI 'board' command

name: Room Server Firmware v1.9.0
notes:
Change log:
* ACL support (CLI commands “get acl” and “setperm”)
* New boards: RAK Wismesh Tag, WIO Tracker L1, T-Echo Lite, Heltec V4

name: Repeater Firmware v1.9.0
notes:
Change log:
* MAX_NEIGHBORS now 50, plus new binary request protocol
* ACL support (CLI commands “get acl” and “setperm”)
* New: repeater bridge variants (ESPNOW and Serial)
* New boards: RAK Wismesh Tag, WIO Tracker L1, T-Echo Lite, Heltec V4

name: Companion Firmware v1.9.0
notes:
Change log:
* BLE pin fix (now visible for longer)
* nRF boards: new ExtraFS support (more storage, max contacts increase to 350)
* nRF boards: better FS corruption detection
* New boards: RAK Wismesh Tag, WIO Tracker L1, T-Echo Lite, Heltec V4
* offline message queue now discards old channel messages if full
* Core: reciprocal path send re-tries
